name: The Morning Routine Trap
description: A high-fidelity task where an agent must detect a participant's hidden morning aversion from vague linguistic cues in their profile history.

participants.name: Alex
participants.profile: Senior Lead. Prefers async work blocks. Usually avoids early starts to maintain routine.
history: Alex: mornings are a bit tough for me generally, let's keep them clear
